pi_items.source: Task description explicitly defines these exact accounts (names, codes, and groups) to be created.
Task description specifies navigating to 'Settings', which matches the standard Manager.io UI structure.
Task description specifies navigating to 'Chart of Accounts', and the evaluation script fetches from '/chart-of-accounts'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three synthetic expense accounts in Manager.io's Chart of Accounts under Settings. The required accounts are: 'Freight and Delivery' (Code: 5100), 'Vehicle Maintenance' (Code: 5200), and 'Professional Services' (Code: 5300), all assigned to the 'Expenses' group.
